query: Take the Zotero items tagged review-queue but not literature-reviewed, make sure the papers exist in Page Index, read them, write one final literature review to the path I give you, and retag the Zotero items when you're done.
why: This is the exact end-to-end Zotero tag queue to aggregate literature review workflow.

query: From my Zotero queue tags, generate per-paper evidence notes and summary files, then synthesize a single review chapter and save it as Markdown.
why: Starts from Zotero tags and asks for both per-paper artifacts and one final review.

query: Process Zotero items with include/exclude tag rules, use Page Index as the reading source, and create one aggregate literature review with final success/error tagging.
why: Combines tag-based selection, Page Index reading, synthesis, and retagging.

query: Use my Zotero review queue to build reusable paper evidence cards and summaries, then write the final literature review file and remove the queue tag from successful items.
why: Queue-driven orchestration with saved intermediate artifacts and outcome tagging is core scope.

query: Work through the papers in my Zotero review queue, use Page Index as the ground-truth reading source, and produce one final review chapter plus reusable paper artifacts.
why: Uses queue language and review deliverables without needing to say the skill name explicitly.

query: I need a pipeline from Zotero tags to one saved dissertation literature review chapter, with per-paper evidence cards and summaries along the way.
why: Strong end-to-end orchestration prompt with saved artifacts and one final chapter output.

query: Draft a literature review from these ten already-prepared reading notes.
why: Pure synthesis from prepared notes belongs to literature-review, not the Zotero queue orchestrator.

query: Find these papers in Page Index and tell me the verified filenames.
why: Pure Page Index resolution belongs to pageindex-find-papers.

query: Summarize these Page Index papers into one Markdown file each.
why: Per-paper summary generation by itself belongs to pageindex-summarize-papers or summarize-research-papers.

query: Upload these Zotero attachment URLs to Page Index and preserve the filenames.
why: Pure Zotero-to-Page-Index ingest belongs to zotero-docai-ingest-to-pageindex.

query: Add the tag reviewed to all Zotero items with queue-tag and remove queue-tag from them.
why: Standalone retagging without the literature-review workflow is too narrow for this orchestrator.

query: Read and summarize the Zotero papers selected by these tags, but do not write any final aggregate review.
why: This is paper-level reading and summarization only, not the full aggregate review orchestration.

query: Classify these research papers into my taxonomy after reading them.
why: Classification belongs to classify-research-papers, not this review orchestration skill.
